message:
Add all enabled plugins to Claude workflow

Keep plugin list in sync with .claude/settings.json.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -24,8 +24,13 @@ jobs:
       - uses: anthropics/claude-code-action@v1
         with:
           anthropic_api_key: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
-          # Load plugins from this repo
+          # Keep in sync with .claude/settings.json
           plugin_marketplaces: |
             https://github.com/tenzir/claude-plugins.git
           plugins: |
             changelog@tenzir
+            docs@tenzir
+            formatter@tenzir
+            git@tenzir
+            meta@tenzir
+            prose@tenzir
